title: Basic English Greetings
description: Test your knowledge of common English greetings and introductions
content: This challenge tests your understanding of basic English greetings.

questions.questionText: How do you greet someone in the morning?
questions.explanation: We say 'Good morning' when we meet someone before noon.

questions.questionText: What is the correct response to 'How are you?'
questions.explanation: 'I'm fine, thank you' is the most common polite response.
We say 'Nice to meet you' when meeting someone for the first time.
